channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-07-17 to 2026-07-23
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 4 INTERESTING, 3 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Fri 2026-07-17: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 7.0 sec, wind 5 kt WNW, water 74°F. Low tide: 04:11, 16:20. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sat 2026-07-18: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 07:00, 1.7 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 6 kt SSW, water 72°F. Low tide: 04:55, 17:10. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sun 2026-07-19: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 14:00, 2.4 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 6 kt NW, water 72°F. Low tide: 05:40, 18:02. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Mon 2026-07-20: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 6 kt NNE, water 71°F. Low tide: 06:27, 19:00. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (NNE). Tue 2026-07-21: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.6 ft @ 5.6 sec, wind 8 kt S, water 70°F. Low tide: 07:16, 20:02. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.6 sec); wind direction off (S). Wed 2026-07-22: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 4.1 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 10 kt SW, water 70°F. Low tide: 08:08, 21:02. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (4.1 ft); period too short (5.5 sec). Thu 2026-07-23: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 14:00, 2.4 ft @ 7.3 sec, wind 4 kt WNW, water 73°F. Low tide: 09:01, 21:58. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 4 INTERESTING, 3 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Fri 2026-07-17: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 7.0 sec, wind 5 kt WNW, water 74°F. Low tide: 04:11, 16:20. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sat 2026-07-18: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 07:00, 1.7 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 6 kt SSW, water 72°F. Low tide: 04:55, 17:10. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sun 2026-07-19: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 14:00, 2.4 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 6 kt NW, water 72°F. Low tide: 05:40, 18:02. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Mon 2026-07-20: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.2 sec, wind 6 kt NNE, water 71°F. Low tide: 06:27, 19:00. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (NNE).
  • Tue 2026-07-21: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.6 ft @ 5.6 sec, wind 8 kt S, water 70°F. Low tide: 07:16, 20:02. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.6 sec); wind direction off (S).
  • Wed 2026-07-22: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 4.1 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 10 kt SW, water 70°F. Low tide: 08:08, 21:02. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (4.1 ft); period too short (5.5 sec).
  • Thu 2026-07-23: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 14:00, 2.4 ft @ 7.3 sec, wind 4 kt WNW, water 73°F. Low tide: 09:01, 21:58. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
